SELECT tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) AS decoded FROM test_base64;
SELECT tryBase64Decode(concat(encoded_string, '==')) AS decoded_extended FROM test_base64;
SELECT if(tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) = '', 'Decoding failed', 'Decoded successfully') AS decode_status FROM test_base64;
SELECT encoded_string, tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) AS decoded FROM (SELECT encoded_string FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_string IS NOT NULL);
SELECT countIf(tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) != '') AS valid_decodes FROM test_base64;
SELECT (SELECT tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) FROM test_base64 WHERE encoded_string = 'RW5jb2RlZA==') AS single_decode;
SELECT t1.encoded_string, tryBase64Decode(t2.invalid_string) AS attempted_decode FROM test_base64 AS t1 JOIN (SELECT 'invalid' AS invalid_string) AS t2 ON t1.encoded_string = t2.invalid_string;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_base64 AS SELECT encoded_string FROM test_base64;
SELECT encoded_string, tryBase64Decode(encoded_string) AS decoded FROM temp_base64 WHERE encoded_string IN ('RW5jb2RlZA==', 'invalid', 'U29tZSBmb3JtYXR0YWJpbGl0eQ==');
